project_type: Python CLI application - Self-evolving AI development kernel
build_system: setuptools via pyproject.toml, no special build step needed
test_framework: pytest with conftest.py fixtures in tests/
verification_instructions: Run 'python -m pytest tests/ -q' from project root. All 894 tests must pass.
setup_instructions: pip install pyyaml pytest pytest-cov (already installed in environment)
environment_constraints: Python 3.12 available. No external network needed for tests.
contribution_requirements: All tests must pass. Skill paths in _index.yaml must resolve.
key_patterns: KnowledgeStore uses self.skills_dir (Path) to locate skills. SkillComposer reads SKILL.md from skills_dir/path/SKILL.md or repo_root/path/SKILL.md. SkillFactory creates skills under knowledge_dir/skills/. WorkflowBridge reads _index.yaml via constructor path. setup_check.py checks knowledge/skills/_index.yaml and resolves paths relative to project root.
directory_structure: Root: runner.py (entry point), setup_check.py, kernel/ (core engine), knowledge/ (rules, skills, patterns), memory/ (runtime state), tests/. Skills are currently in two places: 18 root-level skill dirs + 9 under knowledge/skills/.
